figures.caption: Figure 1: Pipeline of a single CFR iteration in Parallel CFR. Blue stages execute on CPU with OpenMP parallelism; the orange stage runs on GPU. Stages 3/4 and Stage 5 execute in parallel (dashed box). Annotations indicate the parallelization dimension.

Figure 3: Wall-clock convergence comparison between Parallel CFR and PokerRL on a river subgame. Solid lines: Parallel CFR (ours); dashed lines: PokerRL. Both solvers run two CFR variants (DCFR, PCFR+) on the same game tree with no information abstraction or pruning.
Table 4: Per-street CFR pipeline time across raise action count and SPR.
Table 3: Per-stage CFR pipeline time for full configuration.
Figure 2: Per-iteration CFR pipeline time vs. thread count K.
Table 1: Seven-stage CFR iteration pipeline. Each stage is parallelizable along at least one dimension.
